name: Agent Shield
description: Multi-agent runtime security layer: scans agent-to-agent messages for prompt injection, identity spoofing, context poisoning, delegation loops, and confidence amplification. Includes automatic recovery routing for compromised agents and display-layer secret redaction.

mode.description: monitor = log threats without blocking; enforce = block and recover

maxDelegationDepth.description: Maximum allowed agent delegation depth before triggering a loop detection

maxRecoveryAttempts.description: Maximum self-repair attempts before generating an escalation artifact

redactSecrets.description: Strip secret-like patterns from agent output before channel delivery

filterMcpEnv.description: Filter environment variables before MCP subprocess spawn

allowedEnvVars.description: Additional env vars to pass through to MCP subprocesses (PATH, HOME, XDG_* always pass)

threatLog.description: Where to persist threat detection events
